items.text: · May 13 K9 Rip, currently PSP’s only bloodhound, has assisted with many cases since August. K9 Rip and handler Trooper Petrof have successfully tracked people and discovered evidence across miles of terrain, including dozens of missing or endangered persons and criminal suspects.

· May 12 In honor of #NationalPoliceWeek, please join us in thanking all our law enforcement brothers and sisters who have dedicated their lives to keeping our communities safe by serving, protecting, and upholding the law.

· May 7 Trooper Abhaisingh of Troop F visited Wyoming Seminary and Preschool. He read them a book and made them all Junior Troopers with their very own big hats. The tour of the patrol car was a big hit!

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 5 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Rylee Anderson was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.
